test_name: Verify Creation and Execution of Test Cases
description: This test scenario verifies that a user can successfully create a test case, execute it, and analyze the results using the platform.
steps: Navigate to the RoostGPT Test Dashboard.
Locate and click on the 'tag/RoostGPT/operation/TestGptController_createTestPlan' link to navigate to the test case creation section.
Click on the 'POST\n/test/createTestPlan' button to open the test case creation form.
Fill out the test case details, including name, description, and steps.
Submit the test case creation form.
Verify that the test case appears in the test case list.
Navigate to the test execution section via 'tag/RoostGPT/operation/TestGptController_getAllTestPlan'.
Select the newly created test case.
Execute the test case using the 'GET\n/test' button.
Wait for the test execution to complete.
Verify that the test results are displayed.
Analyze the test results to identify any issues.
Navigate to the historical data section to review past test executions.
Verify that the historical data includes the latest test run.
expected_results: User successfully creates a new test case.
The test case is executed successfully.
Test results are displayed and can be analyzed.
Historical data includes the latest test run.
edge_cases: Attempt to create a test case without a name.
Execute a test case with no defined steps.
Analyze results with no data due to a failed execution.
Create a duplicate test case and verify error handling.
Check historical data when there are no previous tests.
dependencies: User must have access to create and execute test cases.
The test environment must be configured correctly.
Network connectivity to run tests on remote environments.
api_interactions: Monitor the API calls for test case creation.
Track API requests for test execution.
Verify API responses for test results retrieval.
performance_metrics: Measure the time taken to create and execute test cases.
Evaluate the responsiveness of the test results page.
Analyze the load time for historical data retrieval.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure all buttons and links are accessible via keyboard navigation.
Verify that screen readers can read test case details.
Check color contrast for all text and interactive elements.
